behavior_summary: This NPC script delegates nearly all behavior to shared sorcerer and spell-combat systems rather than implementing bespoke logic.
U8P_TALLON::look handles player 'examine' actions by forwarding to a sorcerer-specific U8P_TALLON::look handler and then suspending.
U8P_TALLON::use forwards player 'U8P_TALLON::use'/interaction events to a sorcerer interaction handler and then suspends.
U8P_TALLON::enterFastArea and U8P_TALLON::leaveFastArea act as trigger handlers for area entry/exit; they start detection and reset sorcerer activity respectively.
U8P_TALLON::cast accepts a single uword parameter and forwards it to the combat spell loop to perform spell casting behavior.
notable_control_flow: Each process (U8P_TALLON::look, U8P_TALLON::use, U8P_TALLON::enterFastArea, U8P_TALLON::leaveFastArea, U8P_TALLON::cast) primarily calls an external handler (SORCERER::* or SPELCMBT::combatSpellLoop) and then issues a suspend — control is delegated and the local process yields.
Fast-area handlers (U8P_TALLON::enterFastArea / U8P_TALLON::leaveFastArea) are triggered by actor entry/exit of the NPC's trigger region and only invoke detection/reset routines before suspending.
U8P_TALLON::cast is a direct delegation into the combat spell system; the single parameter is forwarded (inferred), so runtime branching and spell resolution are delegated externally.
open_questions: What exact semantic does the U8P_TALLON::cast(uword) parameter encode (spell id, spell slot, or combat context)? — likely a spell id (low confidence).

Do the called SORCERER::* functions mutate NPC-specific state beyond detection/activity (they are shared routines; their side-effects on local NPC state are not visible here)? — medium confidence that they manage NPC AI state.
Are there any global flags or cross-script signals that coordinate the sorcerer behaviors not visible in this fragment? — low confidence (no flags read/written here).

main_function.name: U8P_TALLON::look
main_function.purpose: Handle player 'U8P_TALLON::look' (examine) on this NPC by delegating to the shared sorcerer U8P_TALLON::look handler so the NPC produces its examination response/state.
entry_conditions: Invoked when the player examines or 'looks at' the NPC (process type 0x0208).

function_map.name: U8P_TALLON::look
function_map.role: examine handler that delegates to SORCERER::func039C

function_map.name: U8P_TALLON::enterFastArea
function_map.role: fast-area entry trigger that calls SORCERER::sorcererDetectPlayer to begin detection/engagement

function_map.name: U8P_TALLON::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: fast-area exit trigger that calls SORCERER::sorcererResetActivity to stop/reset activity

function_map.name: U8P_TALLON::cast
function_map.role: casting behavior that forwards a uword parameter into SPELCMBT::combatSpellLoop

external_calls.purpose: Produce the NPC-specific response/state when examined (delegated U8P_TALLON::look behavior).
Handle player interaction/usage via a shared sorcerer interaction routine.
Start or update detection/engagement behavior when an actor enters the NPC's fast/trigger area.
Reset or stop sorcerer activity when an actor leaves the NPC's trigger area.
Execute or resolve a combat spell; U8P_TALLON::cast's uword parameter is likely forwarded into the combat spell loop.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This NPC script delegates nearly all behavior to shared sorcerer and spell-combat systems rather than implementing bespoke logic.
